title: Exposure of Sensitive Data Due to Lack of Access Controls
description: Without defined access controls and data classification, sensitive data could be exposed to unauthorized users or systems. This could occur through misconfigured permissions, insecure APIs, or vulnerabilities in the application logic.
attack_vector: Unauthorized access to data due to insufficient or misconfigured access controls.
mitigations: Implement strict access control policies based on the principle of least privilege.
Conduct regular data classification and sensitivity assessments.
